flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Point University fell 22% between 2006 and 2009 (38.0% → 29.7%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Point University fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (22.6% → 17.7%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Point University rose 151% between 2021 and 2024 (794 → 2.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Point University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.1% → 0.0%).
